title: Reliance
promptText: What is the Islamic concept of relying on Allah called?
explanation: Tawakkul means trusting Allah while still taking the right means.

title: Dua in Difficulty
promptText: Which phrase is said upon difficulty or loss: 'Indeed we belong to Allah and...'?
explanation: This is a statement of surrender and trust in hardship.

title: Yunus Dua
promptText: Which Prophet made the dua 'La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni كنت من الظالمين'?
explanation: It is a dua of repentance, humility, and hope.

title: Faith Articles
promptText: Match the article of faith to its focus.
explanation: These are among the core foundations of iman.

title: Best Time for Tahajjud
promptText: When is the best time for Tahajjud prayer?
answerText: The last third of the night.
options: The last third of the night
explanation: That late night window is strongly associated with dua and closeness to Allah.

title: Lord Increase Me
promptText: Complete the dua: 'My Lord, increase me in ___.’
explanation: This is one of the clearest Quranic duas for growth.

title: Morning Faith
promptText: Tap these faith-building habits in a good morning order.
answerText: Wake, Fajr, Quran, dua, daily work.
explanation: A guided order helps build consistent spiritual rhythm.

title: Allah Is Enough
promptText: Which concept is taught by the verse: 'Whoever puts their trust in Allah, He will be enough for them'?
explanation: The verse teaches dependence on Allah with calm confidence.

title: Purification
explanation: Wudu prepares both body and attention for salah.

title: Prayer Validity
promptText: Match the prayer condition to its meaning.
explanation: These basics make salah valid and focused.
